meta.generator: Stata: romer/monthlydisag.do (per series) + stablediag.do (panel), exported then assembled
meta.construction_note: Series generated by running the actual romer Stata code (monthlydisag.do for each consensus, stablediag.do for the panel) and exporting; shocks/BS controls from mpsur mp1.csv, Greenbook from gbweb_row_format.xlsx+rpred, standardized via standshock.ado. FRED macro from mondat.dta; GSS PCs from ForecastErrors. IRF reproduces disaglp.do exactly.
